notes: Bindle components live as TOP items in their respective search piles. Contents pile holds 5 options drawn one-at-a-time. Other items are scattered in piles. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET.md §IV.5, §IV.13.

stick.title: The Stick
stick.flavor: Broken broom handle propped against the freezer for eleven years. Nobody has thrown it away. Nobody has used it.

cloth.title: The Cloth
cloth.flavor: A cloth napkin folded for the next customer. The creases are permanent.

contents_pocket_money.title: Pocket Money From the Till
contents_pocket_money.flavor: Twelve years of unpaid hours, finally taken.

contents_cassette_spine.title: The Cassette Spine — JOHN_47AM_3
contents_cassette_spine.flavor: Elicia archived you while you slept on your feet.

contents_scratched_penny.title: A Scratched Penny From Your Apron
contents_scratched_penny.flavor: The smallest weight that's still mine.

contents_note_from_booth_six.title: A Note From Booth 6
contents_note_from_booth_six.flavor: The message that was meant for me.

contents_graffiti_tag.title: The Graffiti Tag From the Table
contents_graffiti_tag.flavor: FRANKLY / FOOLISH. Scratched twenty years ago. Taken back.

card_within_card.title: The Card Within the Card
card_within_card.flavor: A small printed Fool, pinned to the booth wall.

passive_effects.text: The stranger watched you read it.

fluorescent_strip.title: The Fluorescent Strip
fluorescent_strip.flavor: The metronome of the ceiling tile.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: AUDI ET TACE Luggage Tag
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: AVDI ET TACE. Listen and be silent.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: The Painted Pose
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: John is in a painting in a room he'll never enter.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: The Charioteer's Sysop Handle
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: DOA. Inheritance pending. You can log in.

unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.title: A Number-of-the-Counter Slip
unlockable_items_from_other_arcana.flavor: A receipt with a four-digit hand-written number on it.
